completed_seed_evidence.publication_caveat: Use these results only as engineering evidence. Paper claims require real mechanism text corpus, real PLM/LLM backends, and held-out test reporting.

planned_experiments.purpose: Check that the mechanism extraction pipeline can produce schema-valid records, final predictions, metrics, and a seed graph.
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: Entity F1; Relation F1; Triple F1; Hallucination Rate; Hard Negative Accuracy
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: A reproducible seed run with machine-readable outputs and validation reports.

planned_experiments.purpose: Prove the proposed PLM-guided prompt-atom adjudication method improves mechanism KG extraction.
planned_experiments.dataset: document-split mechanism corpus from papers/manuals/expert rules
planned_experiments.methods: rule_based; plm_only; llm_zero_shot; llm_few_shot; GLiNER; InstructUIE; GoLLIE; Code4UIE; KnowCoder; DeepKE-LLM; constrained_json_llm; proposed
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: Entity F1; Relation F1; Triple F1; Evidence F1; Direction Accuracy
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: Proposed improves Triple F1 and evidence grounding over PLM-only, LLM-only, and simple cascade baselines.
planned_experiments.current_result: requires real corpus and real model backends

planned_experiments.purpose: Show why the method fits low-annotation industrial mechanism extraction.
planned_experiments.dataset: 50/100/300/500-record train budgets with fixed dev/test documents
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: Triple F1; low-resource area under curve; Token/record; Time/record
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: Proposed is more stable than PLM-only under few labels and cheaper than LLM-only full extraction.

planned_experiments.purpose: Prove PLM is structurally useful rather than an optional add-on.
planned_experiments.methods: no_atom; full_prompt; random_atom; rule_atom; plm_uncertainty_atom; proposed_full
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: Triple F1; hallucination rate; LLM call precision; Token/record
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: PLM uncertainty/evidence/atom routing outperforms random or static prompts and reduces unnecessary LLM calls.
planned_experiments.current_result: seed proxy already shows lower hallucination for proposed method

planned_experiments.purpose: Verify that unsupported but plausible triples are rejected.
planned_experiments.dataset: mechanism corpus plus hard negative entity pairs
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: Hard Negative Accuracy; Unsupported Triple Rate; Hallucination Rate
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: Constrained adjudication plus evidence atoms rejects plausible-but-unsupported triples better than free extraction.

planned_experiments.purpose: Evaluate whether better extraction creates a better mechanism graph.
planned_experiments.dataset: assembled KG from each extraction method
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: node duplicate rate; relation conflict rate; mechanism-chain completeness; expert acceptability
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: The proposed method yields cleaner causal/control chains and fewer unsupported graph edges.
planned_experiments.current_result: seed graph files are available for graph-level tooling

planned_experiments.purpose: Show that the mechanism KG can be attached to later quality traceability work without using production rows as extraction gold.
planned_experiments.dataset: downstream production/event records attached after extraction
planned_experiments.methods: entity alignment; event-to-mechanism explanation paths; case-study expert audit
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: trace path hit rate; explanation completeness; expert acceptability; case retrieval precision
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: Quality events can be explained through evidence-backed mechanism paths and recommended actions.

planned_experiments.purpose: Benchmark recent generalist, guideline-following, code-generation, and constrained-output IE methods against the proposed PLM-guided atom adjudication framework.
planned_experiments.dataset: same document-split mechanism corpus and seed proxy dataset for smoke testing
planned_experiments.methods: GLiNER; InstructUIE; GoLLIE; Code4UIE; KnowCoder; DeepKE-LLM; constrained_json_llm; retrieval_augmented_schema_prompt
planned_experiments.primary_metrics: Entity F1; Relation F1; Triple F1; Evidence F1; Invalid Output Rate
planned_experiments.expected_evidence: Frontier baselines clarify whether gains come from schema following, retrieval, constrained decoding, or PLM-guided atom routing.
planned_experiments.current_result: experiment matrix generated; external adapters required

reporting_rule: Use QKG-E0 only as seed engineering evidence; use QKG-E1 to QKG-E7 for paper-scale claims.
